**Ceasefire already violated:** Both sides have violated the April 8 ceasefire agreement since its declaration.[3]

These collapsed negotiations heighten near-term escalation risks and suggest the fragile ceasefire may not survive beyond its two-week window without major diplomatic breakthroughs.
